name: youtube-comments-analyzer
description: Extract, classify, visualize, and import YouTube comments into Neo4j.

scripts.check: node --check scripts/comment-context.mjs && node --check scripts/youtube-comments-tool.mjs && node --check scripts/neo4j-lib.mjs && node --check scripts/neo4j-import-youtube-comments.mjs && node --check scripts/neo4j-context-backfill.mjs && node --check scripts/neo4j-import-channel.mjs && node --check scripts/neo4j-verify-youtube-comments.mjs && node --check scripts/server.mjs && node --check scripts/transcript-tool.mjs && node --check scripts/document-tool.mjs && node --check scripts/document-graph-tool.mjs && node --check scripts/neo4j-import-document.mjs && node --check scripts/neo4j-verify-document.mjs && node --check scripts/graph-ask.mjs && node --check scripts/channel-tool.mjs && node --check scripts/mindmap-tool.mjs
